summary: A Russian Ka-52 helicopter was downed near Nadiivka in Donetsk region, with FPV drones eliminating the crew after a crash landing and striking during their evacuation attempt. In Crimea, Ukrainian forces successfully escorted and struck a key target through multiple layers of air defense and electronic warfare, destroying its launch systems. A rare Russian "Klin" drone was intercepted; it carries a 5 kg warhead, flies up to 120 km at 120 km/h, and uses advanced Li-AFB batteries. Ukrainian rail operator Ukrzaliznytsia is working with military and civilian specialists to protect trains from drone threats, while the Rubicon Center reports over 20,000 enemy targets destroyed, with unmanned systems accounting for 35.4% of kills. Separately, Iranian-backed militias used fiber-optic FPV drones to attack the US Victory Base near Baghdad International Airport.
